programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Bears, Bows, The Colombos
programme.desc: Curtis and childhood friend Dino and his son, Nathan Colombo, take a fly-out adventure of a lifetime to the backcountry of Alaska chasing monster rainbows on the fly while avoiding a big bear.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep102: Whale Sharks + Shark Hunting
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV dives with Whale Sharks in Mexico, explores a shark hunting ritual 300 Miles off the coast of Costa Rica, and takes a Deeper Dive studying shark attacks, Whitetip Reef Sharks and Oceanic Whitetip Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep102
programme.desc: Liquid Edge leaps into canyon pools with the Deap Canyoning Team, captures a first waterfall descent with kayak superstar Steve Fisher, showcases surf cinematographer Larry Haynes, searches the world for secret surf spots via the film Planet Blow, and features an epic swell via Oakley’s Wave of the Winter.

programme.title: Blue World Ep508: Shark’s “Tonic Immobility” + Diving with NASA
programme.desc: Neal Harvey, a world-renown shark handler in the Bahamas, teaches us how to put Reef Sharks into a relaxed state known as tonic immobility. Then, we head to NASA’s Neutral Buoyancy Lab in Houston, where astronauts train for space walking underwater.

programme.title: The Surfing Lifestyle Ep104: In Search of Perfect Waves
programme.desc: A key component of The Surfing Lifestyle is to venture to lesser travelled parts of the world in search of perfect waves, and Dru Adler, Adam Bennetts and their surfboard shaper Daniel MacDonald, did exactly that in southern Sumatra where they found uncrowded perfection and adventure around every turn.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep110: The Ship Sinkers
programme.desc: Mothballed, de-commissioned naval vessels are toxic time-bombs, filled with PCB’s, asbestos, lead paint, oil and grease. Hundreds rust in dockyards around the world. What can be done with them? A team of Canadians has developed an innovative solution…they clean the ships...then sink them!

programme.title: Fly Rod Chronicles: Bears, Bows, The Colombos
programme.desc: Curtis and childhood friend Dino and his son, Nathan Colombo, take a fly-out adventure of a lifetime to the backcountry of Alaska chasing monster rainbows on the fly while avoiding a big bear.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: Wash'Dup
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this mockumentary film will follow a group of ex- snowboard filmmakers and ex-pro riders who never hung it up. Still in love with the sport and fueled by mid life crisis, these shred for lifers are extremely vulnerable to delusions of grandeur. But the dream is always “still alive” in their minds. In turn they ignore all the red flags and continue to do what seems completely irrational to everyone except for them. After a 16 year hiatus, they irresponsibly put their adult obligations behind, and join a pact to make just one last movie. But they are missing a solid presence of youth to make their movie marketable. As a remedy they end up filming with riders that span 2 generations. This unlikely alliance leads them to discover much more about snowboarding and themselves by living the snowboarding dream through an ageless lens. Filled with sketch comedy skits, this film expresses the nuanced story of a young sport reaching a level of maturity the current industry now begins to embrace. From the death of the snowboard shop, and extinction of film media, to the old pro struggling to find their way in life after the glory days are long gone, WashDup is a story that finally needs to be told.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 02
programme.desc: From the moment she strapped into a snowboard, Elena Hight has been an innovative and visionary force in women’s snowboarding. In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we take a look at two of Elena’s greatest achievements. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Scotty Lago and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 03
programme.desc: At age 16, during the 2006 Torino Olympics, Elena Hight was the youngest American to compete in Women’s Halfpipe. In 2010, at the Vancouver Olympics, she sowed the seeds of change to come. In Episode 3 of Elena’s Microdose series we explore more. Featuring Selema Masekela, Papa Mike and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 04
programme.desc: Failure in life can be our biggest teacher. In Episode 4 of her Microdose series, we learn how Elena Hight embraced failure on the global stage, embarked on transformative change, and unlocked her next level. Featuring Selema Masekela, Hana Beaman, Spencer O'Brien, Jamie Anderson, and Jeremy Jones.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 05
programme.desc: When Elena Hight made the surprising decision to set aside her Olympic routine to pursue backcountry riding, she astonished her peers and mentors. In Episode 5 of her Microdose series, we learn how and why Elena made the leap. Featuring Jeremy Jones, Hana Beaman, Todd Jones, and Jamie Anderson.

programme.title: Hwuy’xwet Pune’luxutth (Opening Penelakut)
programme.desc: This beautiful documentary follows a group of First Nation’s students at Penelakut Island Elementary School as they work with Riley McIntosh to create a new mountain bike trail for the community. Throughout the film, director Jason Mannings shares the history of Penelakut Island and its people.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: On The Verge
programme.desc: In the mountains behind the coastal town of Powell River, BC, rock climbers have spent decades quietly pioneering routes on some of the largest granite walls in Canada. As the landscape comes under threat of logging, the climbing community faces an uncertain future. Lives! Logs! Legacies!

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Aston Martin V12 Vantage S Roadster with its 6-litre V12 engine is probably the most amazing export from the UK. In addition: a mountain cruise from dawn to sundown with the Corvette C7 Convertible.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Functional transporters offer high payload and lots of storage space, and the new Volkswagen Crafter is no exception. How does it fare in comparison to the iconic Mercedes Sprinter? Also: the nearly indestructible and also iconic Unimog by Mercedes.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Silvretta Hochalpenstrasse in Austria is the ideal playground for the lightweight power packs Lotus Elise and Roding Roadster. Also: the elegant but still very powerful Porsche 911 Targa 4S.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With the i8, BMW tried to show the automotive world that they were ahead of their time. But why would anybody pay much more for a car that’s slower and less affordable than the brand's M4 and less spacious than the M5?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: We took a look at Mercedes-Benz's first convertible model in their S-class. Also: for the Chevrolet Camaro's 50th anniversary in 2016 the brand released the sixth generation of their classic. And: a mountain cruise with the Corvette C7 convertible.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Three extraordinarily sporty SUVs are the Porsche Macan Turbo, the Mercedes GLA 45 AMG and the Audi RSQ3. Each of these is able to easily cope with each season of the year and, in regards to performance, could be mistaken for a sports car.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 GTS closed the gap between the S and the GT3 in their sports car model range. Also: the Roding Roadster, a handcrafted lightweight sports car with technology by BMW at its core.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: This episode focuses on the 6th generation of two US classics, the Ford Mustang GT and the Chevrolet Corvette Z06, these iconic sports cars' history and development over the past decades.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The tuning company MTM went to work on Audi's already super-powerful S8 luxury sedan and created the S8 Talladega R. Alpina's B6 Biturbo Gran Coupe easily beats its BMW counterpart and makes the road vibrate.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Many of today's supercars rely on hybrid technology or even drive purely electrically. We take a look at the sports cars of the future and try to get an insight into the latest and planned technology.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Porsche Panamera Turbo S is one of the most dynamic sedans in the world. In addition: the Jaguar XJR power sedan with a 550 hp V8 engine and Mercedes' extraordinary four-door coupe CLS 500.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: EcoFin Documentary
programme.desc: “We’re just two surfers that decided we could no longer ignore plastic pollution in our oceans.” –Luise Grossmann.Two young innovators created the first sustainable surfboard fin based on ocean-recycled plastics. The founders of FiveOceans give ocean rubbish a new life, using plastic collected from the Indian Ocean, proving it is possible to close the cycle with ocean waste and high quality surf gear.In this stunning documentary, they prove their mission and reveal a transparent value chain of the waste material to design a performance product for surfers. With their background in engineering, the unrivalled story is underlined by surfing, adventure and great personalities as the two friends battle their way to achieve a much higher goal: reducing the plastic that ends up in the oceans they surf.

programme.title: Discovering Rhodes - Part 1
programme.desc: In this episode we will visit the old town and the palace of the grand master, before we refresh ourselves in the Kallithea Springs, and discover why Rhodes is considered as the sailing Mecca of the Dodecanese. We’ll take a trip to the beautiful Stegna beach to dive in the immaculate crystal blue waters, before venturing out on a SUP, a stand-up paddle board, to experience the unique and ever-growing practice of SUP Yoga. Finally, we’ll visit Panagia Tsambika, a hilltop monastery considered by some to be miracle-working.

programme.title: Discovering Saint Maarten
programme.desc: One of the most captivating and curious islands of the entire Caribbean is without doubt Saint Maarten. The island is split into two nationalities while also hosting many more, becoming a hub of diverse excitement where the best of different cultures takes place. This is probably because the northern half of the island belongs to France while the southern side is part of the Kingdom of the Netherlands, something highly uncommon around the world.Experience a 12-meter sailboat race, planes flying 50 overhead on crystal blue watered beaches, long streets filled with cultural fusion and wildlife tours and an underwater helmet-diving excursion by the side of a submarine wreck in Discovering Saint Maarten.Broadcasted on Nautical Channel.

Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Edison Death Machine
programme.desc: Thought only to exist in legend, Edison's device for contacting the dead is found...and stolen. A group of professional thieves go on a global crime spree reanimating the dead in order to steal treasures thought long lost. Things begin to go wrong when they cannot control the creatures, and the machine begins to develop a mind of its own.

programme.title: Death of A Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Based on true events, a ghost hunter Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal investigation of a suspected haunted house. Along with a cameraman, a reporter, and a spiritual advocate, she embarks on a three night journey into terror.

programme.title: Chain of Souls
programme.desc: When a naive aspiring actress from Podunk, Texas disappears in Los Angeles, her protective sister comes looking for her. The clues lead her to a diabolical cult masquerading as a theater group and the fight of her life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E43 - Diana A Day In The Life
programme.desc: When Diana got engaged, she was constantly in the media's eyes. Throughout her life, she focused on her sons and committed herself to charity work, like speaking out against land mines. Diana used her fame to bring attention to this and other important issues. This well-researched show takes a closer look at one of the 20th century's most amazing people. With never-before-seen footage, it shows her path from a shy teen to becoming the beloved Diana, Princess of Wales, including touching moments from her last days.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E08 - Princess Diana The Uncrowned Queen
programme.desc: This show offers a captivating look into the extraordinary life of one of the 20th century's most fascinating women, seen through an American lens. It features clips from the auction where her dresses were sold.

programme.title: Diana: In Search of Happiness
programme.desc: Experience an in-depth look at Princess Diana, the extraordinary woman of the 20th century. Featuring unique interviews and touching clips, this portrait captures her incredible journey to fame and her ability to overcome the emotional and physical challenges she encountered nearly every day.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E06 - Princess Diana's Legacy
programme.desc: Reflecting on Diana's legacy, this show delves into what Princess Diana left behind after her sudden passing - the impression she left on her children, the royal family, and the people who loved her. The young princes drew admiration with their demeanor at her funeral, but many questioned how their bond with Prince Charles would be moving forward.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E17 - Remembering Diana Princess Of Wales
programme.desc: Remembering Diana, Princess of Wales includes scenes from her state funeral and heartfelt words from her closest friends. It's a warm and reflective look at Diana both as a person and a public figure: the queen that never was and the princess who'll always be remembered.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E42 - Diana A Model Princess
programme.desc: Diana's fashion sense was something people often looked at closely. She had a knack for picking outfits that were both stylish and sophisticated, which always grabbed attention. Her hats were another standout feature; she often wore elegant designs that added a touch of grace to her look. Her hair was also iconic, usually styled neatly with a slight bounce, perfectly framing her face and adding to her elegant appearance.

programme.title: Junk Space Berlin
programme.desc: Welcome to the marginal deviation of reality. An inexplicable rift runs through the dystopian Berlin and four outsiders venture to find their friend.

programme.title: She Is a Good Boy
programme.desc: When Ava's father Gunter, a classic macho dude, shows up at her door, worlds collide.

programme.title: Forces
programme.desc: Under the crushing emotional burden of his terminally ill father and violent brother, 14-year-old Daniel seeks refuge with two outcasts.

programme.title: Nirwana
programme.desc: Simon Dolensky's graduation film from the International Film School Cologne was nominated for the First Steps Award.

programme.title: Brother
programme.desc: Lukasz (24) works for a big name in the industry. But after the death of his mother, his little brother Kamil (13) suddenly appears on his doorstep.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: During WWI the war reaches a small village and changes the fate of an older woman and her 12 year old friend.

programme.title: One Ticket Please
programme.desc: A monument for one of New Yorks most singular theater enthusiast.

programme.title: In The Future They Ate From The Finest Porcelain
programme.desc: In a temporal twist, this movie tells the story of an intervention into the future perception of a territory’s political history.

programme.title: Solomon's Stone
programme.desc: Black-comedy short SOLOMON'S STONE, directed by Ramzi Maqdisi, is adapted from the novel Blue Light by Hussein Barghouty.

programme.title: Clumsy Little Acts of Tenderness
programme.desc: The Finnish short comedy by Miia Tervo portrays an anything but typical relationship between a loving father and his skeptical daughter.

programme.title: Grimm’s Cuckoo
programme.desc: This short film dares a slightly different view of life in a psychiatric clinic. Screened at Cannes Short Film Corner and Interfilm Berlin.

programme.title: Oh Yeah, She Performs
programme.desc: A doc about four extraordinary women pursuing the same dream: composing, producing and living from their own music, without compromising their ideals

programme.desc: Cecile and her family decide to leave NYC for a quieter life away from the city, but soon find themselves victim to evil spirits residing in their new home.

programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.desc: A school teacher from Tehran is preparing to attend a wedding in northern Iran. When her husband suddenly forbids her to go, she makes a choice that will place her on a painful path zig to atonement.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Making Out
programme.desc: A screenwriter and self-proclaimed hopeless romantic meets a beautiful actress and they decide to act out their ideal love scenarios. When real feelings start to jump off the page and become real will he tell her how he feels? They're in love, probably.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: A recovering heroin addict tries to rebuild his life as a jazz drummer, but crime, manipulation, and temptation threaten to pull him back into his dark past.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: A Marine rookie and his mentor vie for a nurse’s love, battling together in the air and on Nicaraguan battlefields.

programme.title: The Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A clumsy young man nurtures a plant and discovers that it's carnivorous, forcing him to kill to feed it

programme.title: His Girl Friday

programme.title: Quicksand

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes sets out to discover why a trio of murderous villains, including a dangerously attractive female, are desperate to obtain three unassuming and inexpensive little music boxes

programme.title: Embrace Your Place
programme.desc: What if where you are right now is exactly where God wants you? He hasn’t overlooked you; He’s set you apart. Learn how to stop comparing your position to someone else’s platform and start embracing the purpose God has for your life.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 3
programme.desc: Official live videos from the album SO BE IT by Elevation Worship.

programme.title: On My Way Back
programme.desc: When it feels like God’s taking you the long way, remember: He’s worthy of your wait. If you’re feeling discouraged or struggling with obedience while you wait, start by being honest with God about where you are and trusting that His timing is always working for your good.

programme.title: Begin With Amen
programme.desc: There are seasons and situations we write off — God could never use that. But Jesus already knew about it when He found you, and He’s got a plan to redeem it. You might be wondering how, because you can’t see it yet. This sermon is an invitation to believe. If you want to know what God can do through your life, follow and find out.

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 4
programme.desc: Official live videos from the album SO BE IT by Elevation Worship.

programme.title: Faith to Stay
programme.desc: When we’re going through a season that’s uncomfortable or uncertain, we often look for a way out. But Jesus demonstrates another way that leads to lasting transformation and fulfillment if we have the faith to follow His example.

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: It Still Works
programme.desc: Pastor Steven showed us through the life of Moses how faith often looks like taking action even while you feel full of doubt. God can do miracles when we have the courage to look our doubt in the face and do it anyway.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila wants to know what Mother Isabel is doing at Elda's house and is told that she is helping the orphanage. Camila and Yeli are on the sidewalk where Camila's mother abandoned her when she was 5 years old, scared and crying.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: In the corridors it is rumored that Max sponsors Camila in exchange for sex. A gunshot keeps Javier unresponsive. Camila and Marcelina confront each other, always about her mother's affair, and then Camila decides to apologize.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: After discovering Florencia in the company of Hilario, Nicolás accuses Guanipa of manipulating the woman so that she will give him information about Nicolás' investigation into her father's death. While Hilario admits to his daughter Victoria that he is to blame for the fire that is ravaging the lands of Cantarrana for his desire to take revenge on Nicolás, a farmhand notifies Nicolás that a fierce fire is destroying the cornfields of Los Samanes. Sergio accepts Victoria's marriage proposal and hopes that one day she will love him as much as he does.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: As much as Hilario insists on rebuilding his life with Florencia, she believes that there are still things to lose before she can be happy with Hilario Guanipa Before Federico, Fernanda must admit that she murdered Genara; alone, Federico keeps his mother's confession that he has recorded on a video camera. After a week, Victoria insists on marrying Sergio even though Adelaida and Clementina refuse; although Victoria does not love Sergio, she needs her mother's support to be happy; Adelaida does not want her daughter to make a mistake. Once at the civil headquarters, Carmencita tries to convince Victoria to cancel her marriage, while Hilario believes that Sergio is forcing Victoria to get married; at that moment, Nicolás shows up to tell Victoria that Sergio has sordid business with Fernanda, but Victoria does not believe Del Casal.Before Fernanda, Sergio claims to have his confession about Genara's death, so Fernanda points her gun at the man; the couple argues and the gun goes off; Florencia watches as Sergio - mortally wounded - leaves the office.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis, without mercy, throws Malena out of the Corona house; she pleadingly refuses to return to Pablo. Blinded by jealousy, Guillermo seeks to subdue "his wife", but Lorena arms herself with a knife ready for anything. Gertrudis and Claudio celebrate their triumph, when there is a knock at the door and we see that it is Alberto.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis reminds Claudio of the convenience of keeping their relationship hidden to avoid raising suspicions while living the freedom of their love. Guillermo once again issues a death sentence on Alberto, should Lorena consider leaving him for Alberto. Alberto shows up at Lorena's house under the pretext of checking on Ignacio; she is terrified recalling Guillermo's threat, telling him that it's not a good idea for him to be there, but a lovestruck Alberto responds that he cannot, does not want to, nor plans to leave her life.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Pastora asked Israel if he loves her or her twin, since he was in love with Illis in the past; confused, Israel withdraws.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max está demasiado dolido y no cree ya en ese amor, advirtiéndole que a partir de ahora se dedicará a odiarla, a olvidarla y que será ella la victima de su propia decisión. Ciego de ira y de dolor, grita a los presentes que se retiren pues no habrá boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La vida de Camila ha dado un giro inusitado: es una persona envenenada por el odio y los deseos de venganza. Max no logra superar su resentimiento por el desprecio y la humillación que le hizo Camila. La verdadera razón por la cual no pudieron casarse, está escrita en el cuaderno que Rosa envió.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila le exige a Marcelina que le confiese lo que decían las cartas que mandó a quemar. Ante tanta presión ésta cuenta lo que para inculpar a Rosa Blanco. Max

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel plantea de forma desinteresada ayudar a Camila a encontrar a su mamá, pero ella expresa que será un trato en que ambos ganarán. Fausto sorprende a Julia con Gregorio en el apartamento de Amelia. Max, desahoga su dolor con Astrid, a quien Camila pidió que lo ayudara a olvidarla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fuerte tensión cuando Max encuentra a Camila en la mansión López Méndez. Fausto y Patricia, duros y crueles, agreden a Julia, pero saben que el peor castigo vendrá de manos de su propio padre, Ezequiel.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel pretende que Camila le entregue el cuaderno para conocer bien los detalles de la venganza. Luego, la sorprende al pedirle que se case con él a cambio de ayudarla pues si no hay boda, no hay trato ni sociedad.

programme.title: Mi Pequeña Pesadilla
programme.desc: Después de la terrible experiencia y la pérdida de sus amigos, Heather se ve obligada a regresar al Hotel Fear donde Travis se prepara para sus próximas víctimas.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Tirabeque
programme.desc: Sebas es redactor de un periódico digital que nadie lee, está en trámites de divorcio y tiene problemas con el alcohol. Toda su vida se desmorona hasta que le encargan un reportaje sobre los tirabeques. Lo que en un inicio parecía un trabajo tranquilo se convertirá en una investigación de consecuencias impredecibles.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
